title: PolyShader
description: Godrays,Bloom,SSAO & time-of-day color grading — all via vanilla post-shaders. Requires only Polytone.
body:
# **PolyShader**

Shader-quality visuals. No Iris. No FPS loss.

PolyShader is a resource pack that uses Polytone's post-shader system to bring 
shader-like visuals to Minecraft — with virtually zero performance cost.

**Features**
- 🌅 **Time-of-Day System** — 6 keyframes (sunrise, day, noon, sunset, night, midnight) 
  with smooth transitions. Color grading, fog, bloom and vignette all change dynamically.

- ☀️ **Godrays** & **Lens Flare** — Sun and moon god rays that change color with the time of day. 
  Disabled during rain.

- ✨ **Bloom** — Dynamic bloom that intensifies at sunrise and sunset.

- 🌫️ **Atmospheric Fog** — Warm haze during the day, deep blue at night.

- 🔲 **SSAO** — Ambient occlusion for deeper, more grounded shadows.

- 🌙 **Vignette** — Subtle edge darkening that strengthens at night.

**Requirements**
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) (required)

**Credits**
- Godrays based on [Sunbathing Godrays](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunbathing-godrays) 
  by [MehVahdJukaar] (https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar)
